example: The city is located in the north of the country.
Birds fly south for the winter.
The sun rises in the east.
The coast is on the west side of the island.
The wind is blowing from the northeast.
Drive northwest on Route 66.
They moved to the southeast for a warmer climate.
The national park is in the southwest region.
The bank is next to the post office.
She sat beside him during the lecture.
The cafe is opposite the train station.

chinese: 在……对面（隔着街道或空间）
example: My house is across from the park.
The library is between the school and the park.
There is a bus stop in front of the museum.
The parking lot is behind the building.
The pharmacy is on the corner of Main Street and 1st Avenue.
The new hotel is adjacent to the shopping mall.
There is a large fountain in the center of the square.
Don't stop in the middle of the road.
Riverside Drive runs parallel to the river.
Go straight ahead for two blocks.
Turn left at the traffic lights.
Turn right when you see the gas station.
Go past the supermarket, and you'll see the hospital.
Cross the street using the pedestrian crossing.
Cross the intersection carefully.
Take the first right, and the store is right there.
Take the second right, and the restaurant will be on your left.

chinese: 十字路口 / 交叉路口
example: Turn right at the next intersection.

chinese: 交叉路口 / 十字路口
example: We met at the crossroads near the town.
The Eiffel Tower is a famous landmark in Paris.
Enter the coordinates into your GPS.
The map shows the lines of latitude.
Can you check the longitude of this location?
According to the map's scale, one inch represents ten miles.
I spend most of my weekends studying in the library.

chinese: 阶梯教室 / 大报告厅
example: The introductory psychology class is held in the main lecture hall.
The physics laboratory has new equipment.
Students must wear safety goggles in the chemistry lab.
You can print your assignment at the computer lab on the second floor.
The graduation ceremony will take place in the school auditorium.
Freshmen are usually required to live in the dormitory.
My dorm is quite close to the library.
The new residence hall has air conditioning in every room.
The food in the dining hall is actually quite good this semester.
Let's grab a quick lunch at the cafeteria.
Let's meet at the coffee shop in the student union.
The club fair is being held in the student center.
You can get a flu shot at the campus clinic.
If you feel sick, you should go to the campus health center.
There is a shared laundry room in the basement of our dorm.
The indoor volleyball game is in the main gymnasium.

chinese: 健身房 / 体育馆（简称）
example: Many students go to the gym to work out after classes.
The football game will be held at the college stadium tonight.
She runs five laps around the track and field every morning.
The outdoor basketball court is always busy in the evening.
You need to book the tennis court in advance.

chinese: 四方院 / 校园中心广场（简称）
example: Students love to read on the grass in the quad when it's sunny.
The historic buildings surround the main quadrangle.
You need to submit these forms to the administration building.
The admissions office is offering campus tours for prospective students.
The career center helps students polish their resumes and find internships.

chinese: 校园安保处 / 保卫处
example: If you lose your ID card, please report it to campus security.
The shuttle bus leaves from the main gate every 15 minutes.
